title: hieracium floccinops
intro: Hieracium floccinops, commonly known as woolly hawk's beard, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), characterized by its white or yellowish flowers and hairy leaves. Traditionally, Hieracium floccinops has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium floccinops can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
